ddls:
CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object (e.g., Cell, Particle) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object type */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the object (e.g., active, inactive, deleted) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the object was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES object_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "image_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "frame_num" INTEGER /* Frame number of the image */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date the image was captured */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the image belongs to */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the image belongs to */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the image was captured */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the image metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the object is in */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being tracked */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the object */,
  "min_row_bb" INTEGER /* Minimum row coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "min_col_bb" INTEGER /* Minimum column coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "max_row_bb" INTEGER /* Maximum row coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "max_col_bb" INTEGER /* Maximum column coordinate of the bounding box */,
  "centroid_row" INTEGER /* Row coordinate of the centroid */,
  "centroid_col" INTEGER /* Column coordinate of the centroid */,
  "major_axis_length" REAL /* Length of the major axis of the object */,
  "minor_axis_length" REAL /* Length of the minor axis of the object */,
  "max_intensity" INTEGER /* Maximum intensity value of the object */,
  "mean_intensity" REAL /* Mean intensity value of the object */,
  "min_intensity" INTEGER /* Minimum intensity value of the object */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track the object is part of */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Velocity of the object in the current frame */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the object in the current frame */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metrics were calculated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_metrics_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_metrics_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES object_tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_metrics_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object being tracked */,
  "start_frame" INTEGER /* Frame number where the tracking starts */,
  "end_frame" INTEGER /* Frame number where the tracking ends */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the track */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the track belongs to */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the track belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the track was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the track was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_object_tracks_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the image */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the metadata belongs to */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image */,
  "format" TEXT /* File format of the image */,
  "capture_device" TEXT /* Device used to capture the image */,
  "capture_settings" TEXT /* Capture settings used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the metadata belongs to */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metadata belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_metadata_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "object_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the object type (e.g., Cell, Particle) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the object type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the object type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the project */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., lead, collaborator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the assignment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
